'''Illodia''' was the sector capital of [[Illodia sector/Legends|Illodia sector]] and home to the Illodian culture of Humans. The Illodians colonized 20 planets in Illodia sector.

==History==
Illodia was annexed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], which tried to eliminate the planet's ruling oligarchy by levying huge taxes while the planetary government defied its orders.

[[Exmoor]], the estate of the [[Clan Beruss|Beruss family]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], was dominated by a skyscraper named the [[Illodia Tower]], and had an artificial lake with fish imported from the planet.
